Home › Browse › Locations › Ashwind Harbor

Ashwind Harbor

Category: locations Domain: geography Subtype: settlement

A sheltered coastal settlement serving traders and explorers returning from volcanic expeditions inland.

Ashwind Harbor sits on a natural bay protected from ash-laden winds by basalt cliffs to the north.

Merchants exchange expedition supplies here before routes turn inland toward the Cinder Basalt Flats. The harbor remains a common waypoint in community travel logs.

Related

  • cinder basalt flats
  • explorers league hall
